penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the maximum time limit. The cutting appears to have stopped partway around the circle.

reasoning: The video shows clear progression through the initial phases of precision cutting with scissors following the marked circle on gauze. However, the cutting action stops before completing the full circle, and no final release of a complete circle is observed. Since the task was not completed within the maximum time allowance, this results in an incomplete_circle penalty and zero score according to the rubric.
